title: Richly Crunchy Thai Shrimp Satay
description: A sweet and crispy Thai dish featuring shrimp satay with a dashi twist, served en-croute with low-glycemic-friendly ingredients
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together dashi powder, coconut milk, fish sauce, lime juice, and honey
Add the shrimp to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Remove the shrimp from the marinade and cook until pink and fully cooked
Season the shrimp with salt and black pepper
Thaw the phyllo dough according to package instructions
Layer the phyllo dough in a large baking dish, brushing each layer with vegetable oil
Place the cooked shrimp in the center of the phyllo dough and fold the dough over the shrimp to form a triangle
Brush the top of the phyllo dough with vegetable oil and bake until golden brown
